title: 你想看什么书？
titleTranslation_en: What book do you want to read?
description_uz: «Qo'lingda nima bor?» — ikki do'stning kutubxonadan olingan kitob haqidagi suhbati. Bu dialog egalikni aytish, miqdor bildirish va muddat haqida so'rashni o'rgatadi. Tanish mavzu, o'qish uchun foydali so'zlar — takrorlash uchun qisqa. Shadowing va rol o'ynash uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «Что у тебя в руках?» — разговор двух друзей о книге, взятой в библиотеке. Этот диалог учит говорить о принадлежности, указывать количество и спрашивать о сроках. Близкая тема, полезная лексика для учёбы — короткий для повторения. Отлично для шэдоуинга и ролевых игр.
description_en: «What's in your hand?» — two friends talking about a book borrowed from the library. This dialogue teaches expressing possession, stating amounts, and asking about deadlines. Familiar topic, vocabulary for reading—short enough to repeat. Great for shadowing and role-play.

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ qù tú shū guǎn. Nǐ ne?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я иду в библиотеку. А ты?
sentences.text_translation_en: I'm going to the library. And you?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我也去图书馆。我们一起吧。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yě qù tú shū guǎn. Wǒ men yì qǐ ba.
sentences.text_translation: Men ham kutubxonaga. Yur, birga boramiz.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я тоже в библиотеку. Давай вместе.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'm going to the library too. Let's go together.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo. Nǐ jiè shū hái shì huán shū?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо. Ты берёшь книгу или возвращаешь?
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay. Are you borrowing or returning a book?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: I'm returning a book. And you?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我借书。我想借一本中文书。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ jiè shū. Wǒ xiǎng jiè yì běn Zhōng wén shū.
sentences.text_translation: Men kitob olaman. Bitta Xitoy tili kitobi olmoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я беру книгу. Хочу взять книгу на китайском.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'm borrowing a book. I want to borrow a Chinese book.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nà biān de Zhōng wén shū duō ma?
sentences.text_translation: U yerda Xitoy tili kitoblari ko'pmi?
sentences.text_translation_en: Are there many Chinese books over there?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Bù zhī dào, wǒ yě dì yī cì qù.
sentences.text_translation: Bilmayman, men ham birinchi marta ketyapman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не знаю, я тоже иду впервые.
sentences.text_translation_en: I don't know, it's my first time going too.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ xiǎng kàn shén me shū?
sentences.text_translation_en: What kind of book do you want to read?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Jiǎn dān de gù shi shū.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Gù shi shū zài èr lóu.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Книги с рассказами на втором этаже.
sentences.text_translation_en: Storybooks are on the second floor.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ qù kàn kan, xiè xie.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, I'll go take a look, thanks.
sentences.speaker: B
